description.value:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

A single mote of light shines in this glass vial, emitting bright light in a 20-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 20 feet. When you open the vial, the mote collides with a creature within 60 feet of your choice. The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Off-Guard] as their equilibrium is wildly thrown off, and begins to glow like a star (bright light for 20 feet, then dim light for 20 more). During the duration, if the creature was or becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Invisible], they become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Concealed] instead. If the creature was already concealed or becomes concealed for any other reason, they are no longer concealed. They must attempt a @Check[will|dc:19] save; a willing creature can choose to fail or critically fail.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is affected for 1 round.

Failure The creature is affected for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature is affected for 10 minutes.
